footer.tagline: Making dental visits fun and stress-free for children of all ages.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Teddy Smile Clinic. All rights reserved.

home.heroDesc: Creating positive dental experiences for children in a warm, friendly environment. Because every child deserves a beautiful, healthy smile!
home.whyChooseDesc: We're dedicated to providing the best pediatric dental care in a fun, stress-free environment
home.feature1Desc: Gentle, compassionate dental care designed specifically for children
home.feature2Desc: Education and prevention to build healthy dental habits for life
home.feature3Desc: Colorful, playful spaces that make kids excited about dental visits
home.feature4Desc: Board-certified pediatric dentists with years of experience
home.ourServicesDesc: Comprehensive dental care tailored for your child's needs
home.testimonialsDesc: Don't just take our word for it - hear from our happy families!
home.ctaTitle: Ready to Start Your Child's Dental Journey?
home.ctaDesc: Book an appointment today and give your child the gift of a healthy, beautiful smile!
home.service1Desc: Comprehensive dental exams and cleanings every 6 months
home.service2Desc: Strengthen tooth enamel and prevent cavities
home.service3Desc: Gentle, pain-free treatment for tooth decay
home.service4Desc: Protective coating to prevent cavities in molars
home.service6Desc: Teaching kids proper brushing and flossing techniques
home.testimonial1Text: My daughter actually looks forward to her dental appointments now! The staff is amazing with kids.
home.testimonial2Text: Best pediatric dentist we've ever been to. They made my son's first visit so comfortable.
home.testimonial3Text: The clinic is so cheerful and welcoming. Our whole family feels at ease here.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Comprehensive pediatric dental care designed to keep your child's smile healthy, bright, and beautiful.
services.faqSubtitle: Common questions parents ask about pediatric dental care
services.ctaDesc: Schedule your child's appointment today and experience the Teddy Smile difference!

about.title: About Teddy Smile
about.subtitle: For over 15 years, we've been creating positive dental experiences for children, building healthy smiles and happy memories that last a lifetime.
about.missionP1: At Teddy Smile Clinic, our mission is to provide exceptional pediatric dental care in a warm, welcoming environment where children feel safe, comfortable, and excited about their dental health.
about.missionP2: We believe that early positive dental experiences set the foundation for a lifetime of healthy habits. That's why we've created a practice that feels more like play than work, where learning about oral health is fun and engaging.
about.missionP3: Our team of board-certified pediatric dentists and caring staff are dedicated to making every visit a positive experience, building trust and confidence in our young patients.
about.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide everything we do at Teddy Smile Clinic
about.teamSubtitle: Experienced, caring professionals dedicated to your child's dental health
about.journeySubtitle: Building a legacy of healthy smiles, one child at a time
about.scheduleDesc: Ready to start your child's journey to a healthy smile? We'd love to meet you!

team.draftBanner: Draft — Team page preview. Content and photos are placeholders.
team.title: Our Team
team.subtitle: Meet the caring professionals behind Teddy Smile. Click any profile to see full details.
team.joinDesc: Ready to meet the team in person? Book a visit and we'll take great care of your child's smile.

contact.title: Get In Touch
contact.subtitle: Schedule an appointment or reach out with any questions. We're here to help make your child's dental experience wonderful!
contact.requestDesc: Fill out the form below and we'll contact you to confirm your appointment time.
contact.requiredNote: * Required fields. We'll contact you within 24 hours to confirm your appointment.
contact.dateNote: We'll do our best to accommodate your preferred date
contact.emergencyDesc: For urgent dental issues, call our emergency line immediately. We reserve same-day appointments for emergencies.
contact.toastSuccess: Appointment request received! We'll contact you shortly.

fees.title: Fee List
fees.subtitle: Transparent pricing for our pediatric dental services. Fees are indicative; we'll provide an exact estimate after your child's examination.
fees.disclaimer: Fees may vary based on your child's needs and insurance. We accept most insurance plans and offer payment options. Contact us for a personalized quote or to verify your coverage.
